app.title: Piauí Viva - Tourism & Culture Guide
app.subtitle: Explore the state's cultural diversity
highlights.title: Highlights
spots.title: Tourist spots
creative.subtitle: Crafts, gastronomy and cultural events
region.costaDoDelta.name: Delta Coast Hub
region.costaDoDelta.summary: Discover the natural beauty of Piauí's coast, with scenic beaches and maritime heritage.
region.poloDasOrigens.name: Origins Hub - Serra da Capivara
region.poloDasOrigens.summary: Travel through prehistory with archaeological sites and preserved natural parks.
region.teresina.name: Teresina Hub
region.teresina.summary: The cultural capital: museums, rivers and events celebrating Piauí's history.
spot.portoLuisCorreia.title: Port of Luís Correia
spot.portoLuisCorreia.summary: Historic port connecting Piauí to the Atlantic world since colonial times.
spot.canyonRioPoti.title: Poti River Canyon
spot.canyonRioPoti.summary: Impressive geological formation with a breathtaking landscape.
spot.parque7Cidades.title: Sete Cidades National Park
spot.parque7Cidades.summary: A set of unique rock formations with ancestral myths and legends.
spot.serraDaCapivara.title: Serra da Capivara
spot.serraDaCapivara.summary: World-class archaeological site with evidence of ancient human occupation.
spot.deltaDoParnaiba.title: Parnaíba Delta
spot.deltaDoParnaiba.summary: Archipelago formed by five outlets to the sea, with endangered species and scenic islands.
spot.cachoeiraUrubu.title: Urubu Waterfall Ecological Park
spot.cachoeiraUrubu.summary: Lush waterfall with fast falls and the piracema phenomenon.
spot.praiaBarraGrande.title: Barra Grande Beach
spot.praiaBarraGrande.summary: Ideal beach for kitesurfing, with strong winds and shallow waters.
spot.praiaPedraSal.title: Pedra do Sal Beach
spot.praiaPedraSal.summary: Beach divided by a hill, with strong waves and calmer areas.
spot.lagoaPortinho.title: Portinho Lagoon
spot.lagoaPortinho.summary: Lagoon with dark waters and pale sand, ideal for water sports.
spot.praiaCoqueiro.title: Coqueiro Beach
spot.praiaCoqueiro.summary: Beach with clear waters and natural pools formed by reefs.
spot.serraConfusoes.title: Serra das Confusões National Park
spot.serraConfusoes.summary: Brazil's largest caatinga reserve, with landscapes that change color.
spot.liraEcoParque.title: Lira Eco Park
spot.liraEcoParque.summary: Park with activities such as tree climbing, zip lining and kayaking.
spot.miranteGritador.title: Gritador Viewpoint
spot.miranteGritador.summary: Panoramic 720-meter viewpoint with native vegetation and rocky walls.
spot.cachoeiraSaltoLiso.title: Salto Liso Waterfall
spot.cachoeiraSaltoLiso.summary: Waterfall with a 35-meter drop, accessible by trail.
spot.caldeiraoRodrigues.title: Caldeirão dos Rodrigues
spot.caldeiraoRodrigues.summary: Archaeological site with rock paintings and an enchanting plateau.
spot.cachoeiraEngenhoVelho.title: Engenho Velho Waterfall
spot.cachoeiraEngenhoVelho.summary: Waterfall with an almost 50-meter drop and stunning cascades.
spot.pedraCastelo.title: Pedra do Castelo Municipal Natural Park
spot.pedraCastelo.summary: Castle-shaped rock formation with prehistoric paintings.
spot.cachoeiraTingidor.title: Tingidor Waterfall
spot.cachoeiraTingidor.summary: Waterfall with bluish waters and a natural pool.
spot.rioPoti.title: Poti River
spot.rioPoti.summary: River that crosses Teresina and helps tell the capital's relationship with its waters.
spot.museuDoPiaui.title: Piauí Museum
spot.museuDoPiaui.summary: Historical and cultural collection dedicated to Piauí's memory.
spot.encontroRios.title: Encontro dos Rios Environmental Park
spot.encontroRios.summary: Meeting point of the Poti and Parnaíba rivers, with legends and gastronomy.
spot.parqueFlorestaFossil.title: Fossil Forest Park
spot.parqueFlorestaFossil.summary: Fossil forest with petrified trunks dating back 250 million years.
creative.artesanatoMarajoara.title: Delta Bobbin Lace
creative.artesanatoMarajoara.description: A traditional craft kept alive by lace makers from Ilha Grande, with handmade pieces that carry the memory and identity of Piauí's coast.
creative.praiasGastronomia.title: Beach Gastronomy
creative.praiasGastronomia.description: Fresh seafood dishes and family recipes passed down through generations.
creative.arteRupestre.title: Rock Art
creative.arteRupestre.description: Paintings and engravings up to 25,000 years old revealing the mysteries of prehistory.
creative.cuisineNordestina.title: Northeastern Cuisine
creative.cuisineNordestina.description: Authentic flavors that reflect the agricultural and cultural richness of the backlands.
creative.economiaCriativaTeresina.title: Creative Economy
creative.economiaCriativaTeresina.descri: Local initiatives by entrepreneurs, designers and artists transforming the capital.
creative.festasPopulares.title: Popular Festivities
creative.festasPopulares.description: Celebrations that unite the community and keep Piauí's traditions alive.
itinerary.description: Select tourist spots to build a cultural route through Piauí.
event.festivalInvernoPedroII.title: Pedro II Winter Festival
event.festivalInvernoPedroII.description: The largest cultural festival in Piauí's mountains, with concerts, exhibitions and an opal fair.
event.semanaBumbaMeuBoi.title: Bumba Meu Boi Week
event.semanaBumbaMeuBoi.description: Folkloric celebration with bumba meu boi parades through the streets of Teresina.
event.encontroSaberesCapivara.title: Capivara Knowledge Gathering
event.encontroSaberesCapivara.descriptio: Academic and cultural event about archaeology and the history of Piauí's backlands.
artisan.ceramicaDelta.title: Delta Artisan Pottery
artisan.ceramicaDelta.description: Unique pieces inspired by the fauna of the Parnaíba Delta, made with ancestral techniques.
artisan.cajuinaArtesanal.title: Artisan Cajuína
artisan.cajuinaArtesanal.description: Traditional Piauí drink made by hand with fresh cashew fruit.
artisan.rendaBilro.title: Bobbin Lace
artisan.rendaBilro.description: Traditional bobbin lace technique creating delicate and unique patterns.
artisan.joiasOpala.title: Opal Jewelry
artisan.joiasOpala.description: Artisan jewelry with precious opals from Pedro II.
artisan.pacocaCarne.title: Sun-Dried Meat Paçoca
artisan.pacocaCarne.description: Backlands delicacy made with shredded sun-dried meat and cassava flour.
artisan.tapecariaRupestre.title: Rock Art Tapestry
artisan.tapecariaRupestre.description: Tapestries inspired by rock paintings from Serra da Capivara.
